name: Kamy Swasey
exp_str: preschool; afterschool; elementary; lead teacher; college student
ai_summary: Kamy Swasey is a childcare professional with preschool and afterschool experience in Japan, holding an associate's degree and a teaching license. Located in Riverton, UT (15mi), she seeks part-time work and emphasizes empathy and quick adaptability in conflict resolution.

transcripts.q3:
Hi, my name is Kami spicy. My interest in childcare all started when I worked with in a local after school Day Care Program in Japan. I worked as a part of the children support team and enjoyed spending time with elementary kids over two years. I decided to study child care and Early Education at a college in Japan and earned an associate's degree, as well as a Japanese national license to be a preschool soft in the garden teacher.
 I have experiences working at a preschool as an assistant lead or year and a Day Care as a Lead Teacher of two year olds for a year. Both in States, I learned so much from children and I love celebrating their Daily Progress.
transcripts.q4: I live in Riverton Utah. I'm willing to travel up to 15 miles.
transcripts.q5:
I want to work part-time and
 I would like a flexible schedule.
 I'm, I'm usually free during the day on weekdays. I can work on Saturday sometimes.
 But no Sundays.
transcripts.q6: I always try to seek for reasoning and show empathy to both sides. I talk to each child and help them understand what happened and why and help them forgive each other. Those are usually a great opportunity for children to learn how to be a good friend.
transcripts.q7: I am a quick learner and easy to adapt. I have experience, assisting in preschool and I work well with people.
